title: HTML & CSS Basics for Beginners
description: Learn the fundamentals of HTML and CSS to build your first web pages
footer: Learn HTML & CSS · Build Your First Website

home.heroSubtitle: Master the essentials of HTML and CSS to create beautiful web pages

blocks.content:
## Welcome to Web Development!

This course will teach you the fundamentals of building websites using HTML and CSS. No prior coding experience needed!

HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the structure of web pages, while CSS (Cascading Style Sheets) makes them look beautiful. Together, they form the foundation of web development.
💡 **Pro Tip**: HTML and CSS work together. HTML creates the content and structure, while CSS styles and decorates it. You need both to build complete web pages!
